716 GG0130F3_UPR_DRSNG_END_CD GG0130F3_UPR_DRSNG_END_CD GG0130F3 Upper Dressing End Indicator CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's ability to dress and undress above the waist; including fasteners, if applicable at the end of the SNF PPS Part A stay. -=Not assessed/no information
 01=Dependent
 02=Substantial/maximal assistance
 03=Partial/moderate
